Organization settings affect management views directly. Headcount updates change per-capita KPIs and rankings. Budget and quota values drive dashboard progress bars and management alerts. Alert strategy controls when a department enters watch or alert state.
Organization Profile
Base information used for organizational comparison and per-capita KPI calculation.
Impacts KPI cards Impacts rankings
Inherited Custom
Budget & Quota
Management targets used by budget progress bars, carbon quota consumption, and warning thresholds.
Impacts dashboard Impacts alerts
Inherited Custom
KPI & Alert Strategy
Defines when a department starts to look risky in leaderboard and management alert views.
Impacts alerts Impacts redline rules
Inherited Custom

Energy strategy is managed here for the current device scope. The existing settings content has been replaced with strategy scheduling and staging controls so the page is aligned with operational policy tuning.

AHU / FCU Settings

This settings page is reserved for a future phase. Configuration for terminal air-side equipment will be implemented later, matching the current Analysis placeholder scope.

Lighting Scene Policies Set target brightness and schedule directly on each scene card. Custom scenes can be added for the current lighting scope.
